Localization.Description: A user logged in under a blacklisted account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} logged in to 1C system {event_src.host} under blacklisted account {subject.application.account.name}
A user from host {src.host} logged in to Bitrix24 system {event_src.host} under blacklisted account {subject.application.account.name}
